item.title: Raspberry Pi Connect may control Windows soon 摘要
item.description:
Raspberry Pi Connect, the free remote access service for Raspberry Pi, may soon support remote controlling Windows PCs. This development was hinted at in a Raspberry Pi forum post. Previously, the service only worked on Raspberry Pi devices, limiting its competitiveness with RealVNC. The potential expansion to Windows could make it a more versatile remote access solution, especially after RealVNC's slow adoption of Wayland left Pi users without a solid option after Pi OS 12 'Bookworm'.
标签: Raspberry Pi, Raspberry Pi Connect, remote access, Windows, RealVNC, Wayland, Pi OS, remote desktop, open source, tech news

item.title: Reiner Pope – The math behind how LLMs are trained and served 摘要
item.description:
Dwarkesh Patel interviews Reiner Pope (CEO of MatX, former Google TPU architect) in a blackboard lecture format. They analyze how frontier LLMs are trained and served, using equations, public API prices, and chalk to deduce lab practices. Topics include batch size's effect on token cost and speed, MoE model layout across GPU racks, pipeline parallelism, over-training due to RL, long context memory costs from API pricing, and convergent evolution between neural nets and cryptography. Reiner co-authored a scaling book and leads a new chip startup.
标签: LLM, inference, training, GPU, batch size, MoE, pipeline parallelism, API pricing, chip design, AI infrastructure

item.title: LLM 0.32a0 is a major backwards-compatible refactor 摘要
item.description:
LLM 0.32a0 alpha release introduces two major changes: prompts can now be represented as a sequence of messages using new `llm.user()` and `llm.assistant()` builder functions, enabling easier replay of previous conversations. Additionally, model responses are now modeled as a stream of typed parts, allowing mixed content types like reasoning, text, tool calls, and multi-modal outputs (images, audio) to be streamed back. These changes better accommodate the diversity of input/output types in modern frontier models, moving beyond the original text-in/text-out abstraction.
标签: LLM, Python, AI, CLI, open-source, streaming, multi-modal, tools, API, release

item.title: Oakland’s Airport Is Now Officially ‘Oakland San Francisco Bay Airport’ 摘要
item.description:
Oakland Airport's rebranding efforts to include 'San Francisco' in its name have largely failed to boost passenger numbers, which continued declining after a brief post-pandemic rebound. San Francisco sued, arguing the name would confuse travelers. After mediation, a settlement was reached requiring 'Oakland' to always appear before 'San Francisco' in all materials, and the airport cannot change its code from OAK. The final name is 'Oakland San Francisco Bay Airport.'
标签: Oakland, San Francisco, airport, rebranding, lawsuit, travel, aviation, naming, settlement, California
